---
title: "modelling trade-off"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(lme4)
library(purrr)
library(broom)
library(MASS)
```


```{r}
results <- read.csv(here("data", "clean data", "results.csv"), colClasses = c(sex = "character"))

#make maternal ID a factor
results$maternalID <- as.factor(results$maternalID)

#make a treatment combination column
results <- results %>%
  mutate(treatment_combination = paste(larval_treatment, pupal_treatment, sep = "_"))  %>%
  filter(larval_treatment %in% c("warm", "hot")) %>%
  mutate(
    larval_treatment = factor(larval_treatment, levels = c("warm","hot")),
    pupal_treatment = factor(pupal_treatment, levels = c("cool","mean","warm","hot"))
  ) %>%
    mutate(weight_mg = weight * 1000)  %>%
  mutate(weight_mg_centered = weight_mg - mean(weight_mg, na.rm = TRUE))


```

```{r}
lm1 <- lm(egg_mean_1A ~ clutch_size, data = results)
summary(lm1)

lm2 <- lm(egg_mean_1A ~ clutch_size + larval_treatment, data = results)
summary(lm2)

lm3 <- lm(egg_mean_1A ~ clutch_size + pupal_treatment, data = results)
summary(lm3)

lm4 <- lm(egg_mean_1A ~ clutch_size + pupal_treatment + larval_treatment, data = results)
summary(lm4)

lm5 <- lm(clutch_size ~ egg_mean_1A + pupal_treatment + larval_treatment + weight_mg, data = results)
summary(lm5)

lm1_nb <- glm.nb(clutch_size ~  egg_mean_1A, data = results)
summary(lm1_nb)

lm2_nb <- glm.nb(clutch_size ~ egg_mean_1A * larval_treatment * pupal_treatment,
       data = results)

summary(lm2_nb)

```

```{r}
models <- results %>%
  group_by(larval_treatment, pupal_treatment) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(
    model = map(data, ~ glm.nb(clutch_size ~ egg_mean_1A, data = .x)),
    tidy  = map(model, tidy)
  )

model_results <- models %>%
  unnest(tidy)
```
